tool.name: Topaz Train
tool.description: Train 2D region classifier from images with labeled coordinates
tool.command:
#import re mkdir -p train_images_dir && #for $img in $train_images: #set $clean_name = re.sub('[^\w\-\.]', '_', str($img.element_identifier)) #if not $clean_name.endswith('.mrc') and not $clean_name.endswith('.tiff') and not $clean_name.endswith('.png'): #set $clean_name = $clean_name + "." + str($img.ext) #end if ln -s '$img' 'train_images_dir/$clean_name' && #end for
#if $test_images: mkdir -p test_images_dir && #for $img in $test_images: #set $clean_name = re.sub('[^\w\-\.]', '_', str($img.element_identifier)) #if not $clean_name.endswith('.mrc') and not $clean_name.endswith('.tiff') and not $clean_name.endswith('.png'): #set $clean_name = $clean_name + "." + str($img.ext) #end if ln -s '$img' 'test_images_dir/$clean_name' && #end for #end if
topaz train --train-images train_images_dir --train-targets '$train_targets' #if $test_images: --test-images test_images_dir --test-targets '$test_targets' #end if --format '$format_' #if str($positive_est.method) == 'pi': --pi $positive_est.pi #else: --num-particles $positive_est.num_particles #end if --radius $radius --method '$method' --slack $slack --autoencoder $autoencoder --l2 $l2 --learning-rate $learning_rate --minibatch-size $minibatch_size --minibatch-balance $minibatch_balance --epoch-size $epoch_size --num-epochs $num_epochs --preload '$preload' --model '$model_' --units $units --dropout $dropout --bn '$bn' #if str($pooling) != 'none': --pooling '$pooling' #end if --unit-scaling $unit_scaling --patch-size $patch_size --patch-padding $patch_padding --device $device --num-workers \${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} --num-threads $num_threads --save-prefix 'model_epoch' -o '$output_curve' > '$output_log' &&
LAST_MODEL=\$(ls -v model_epoch_epoch*.sav | tail -n 1) && cp "\$LAST_MODEL" '$model_output'

param.name: train_images
param.label: Training Micrographs
param.help: Select one or more training micrographs.

param.name: train_targets
param.label: Training Coordinate Targets
param.help: Coordinate file listing training particle coordinates (image_name, x_coord, y_coord).

param.name: method
param.label: Positive Fraction Estimation Method
param.option: Expected Number of Particles per Micrograph

param.name: pi
param.label: Pi
param.help: Expected fraction of positive data points (regions).

param.name: num_particles
param.label: Num Particles
param.help: Expected number of particles per micrograph.

param.name: radius
param.label: Radius (Pixels)
param.help: Pixel radius around particle centers to consider positive during training.

param.name: slack
param.label: Slack Parameter
param.help: Weight on GE penalty. Use -1 for default (10 for GE-KL, 1 for GE-binomial).

param.name: autoencoder
param.label: Autoencoder weight
param.help: Option to augment method with autoencoder. Weight on reconstruction error.

param.name: l2
param.label: L2 Regularizer
param.help: L2 regularization on the model parameters.

param.name: minibatch_balance
param.label: Minibatch Balance
param.help: Fraction of minibatch that is positive data points.

param.name: epoch_size
param.label: Epoch Size
param.help: Number of parameter updates per epoch.

param.name: units
param.label: Units
param.help: Number of units in model base layer.

param.name: unit_scaling
param.label: Unit Scaling Factor
param.help: Scale the number of units up by this factor every pool/stride layer.

param.name: patch_size
param.label: Patch Size
param.help: Classify micrographs in patches of this size to reduce memory usage.

param.name: patch_padding
param.label: Patch Padding
param.help: Padding around each patch to remove edge artifacts.

tool.help:
**What it does**
This tool trains a convolutional neural network (CNN) model to classify positive vs unlabeled regions in cryo-EM micrographs. Topaz uses Positive-Unlabeled (PU) and Generalized Expectation (GE) learning frameworks, allowing models to be trained effectively with only a few labeled particle coordinates.
